text:
Bunzen (ブンゼン, Bunzen) is a town on Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 147 

Overview

Little was shown from Bunzen but it can be suspected that it is densely populated by Greed Island NPCs and/or players. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Abengane uses a "Return" spell card to transport himself back to the town to perform a Nen Exorcism at a nearby forest.
